remaining_phases_in_v0_critical_path.scope: Workstream C (8 plans): cargo clippy -D warnings + cargo audit/deny + ruff/mypy/tsc/go vet + OWASP via /cso skill + ASVS L1 threat model + secrets sweep. Workstream E (9 plans): LICENSE Apache-2.0 + README + CONTRIBUTING + SECURITY + CODE_OF_CONDUCT + CHANGELOG + .gitignore audit + .github templates + optional CI workflow. Plus closure. 24 plans total.

context_notes: Long session (~14h wall-clock) executing the v0 launch. Started with /gsd-resume-work + parallel plan-phase × 4 (13.4/13.5/13.6/13.7) → execute-phase 13.4 (10 plans / 5 waves / parallel gsd-executor agents) → parallel phase-driver agents in worktrees for 13.5/13.6/13.7. 13.5 needed 2 continuations due to context budget. Worktree-init runtime bug surfaced 3× (worktrees initialized at e9ace7c from Phase 44 history instead of v2/greenfield); each agent recovered via git reset --hard at start. All 4 worktree branches merged back to v2/greenfield. 13.5 surfaced the transport-impl deficit at Plan 11 (mypy passed via MagicMock — silent failure). User directive at session end: scrub Co-Authored-By: Claude from all commits + go silent on AI attribution. User taking over discuss + plan steps for remaining 4 phases interactively.
